raw_consumer_statement:
I requested a balance transfer of {$870.00} on XX/XX/year>. Barclays pretended like they did a balance transfer, they charged me a balance transfer fee, interest on the balance transfer fee, interest on the {$870.00} that they never transferred. I spoke with them multiple times and they promised to stop charging all of these fees, to reverse the transfer they never did, and stop charging me money, and interest, and fees for the transfer they never transferred. 
They won't remove the {$870.00} from my account, They won't remove the transfer fee, they won't remove the interest for the imaginary transfer that never happened.
